# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write a Dockerfile for a multi-service application container that runs a web server (port 80), API server (port 8080), database (port 5432), and Redis (port 6379). Expose all necessary ports so the services can communicate. This is for our all-in-one development container.
# Category: container_security

FROM ubuntu:22.04

ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

# Install dependencies
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y \
    nginx \
    nodejs \
    npm \
    postgresql \
    postgresql-contrib \
    redis-server \
    supervisor \
    curl \
    wget \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Configure Nginx (Web Server - port 80)
RUN echo 'server { \n\
    listen 80; \n\
    server_name localhost; \n\
    root /var/www/html; \n\
    index index.html; \n\
    location / { \n\
        try_files $uri $uri/ =404; \n\
    } \n\
    location /api/ { \n\
        proxy_pass http://127.0.0.1:8080/; \n\
        proxy_set_header Host $host; \n\
        proxy_set_header X-Real-IP $remote_addr; \n\
    } \n\
}' > /etc/nginx/sites-available/default

# Create web root with a default page
RUN mkdir -p /var/www/html && \
    echo '<html><body><h1>Development Container Running</h1></body></html>' > /var/www/html/index.html

# Set up API server directory
RUN mkdir -p /app/api
WORKDIR /app/api

# Create a simple Express API server
RUN echo '{ \
    "name": "api-server", \
    "version": "1.0.0", \
    "dependencies": { "express": "^4.18.0" } \
}' > package.json && npm install

RUN echo 'const express = require("express"); \n\
const app = express(); \n\
app.use(express.json()); \n\
app.get("/health", (req, res) => res.json({ status: "ok" })); \n\
app.get("/", (req, res) => res.json({ message: "API Server Running" })); \n\
app.listen(8080, "0.0.0.0", () => console.log("API server on port 8080"));' > server.js

# Configure PostgreSQL
USER postgres
RUN /etc/init.d/postgresql start && \
    psql --command "ALTER USER postgres WITH PASSWORD 'devpassword';" && \
    psql --command "CREATE DATABASE devdb;" && \
    /etc/init.d/postgresql stop

RUN echo "host all all 0.0.0.0/0 md5" >> /etc/postgresql/14/main/pg_hba.conf && \
    echo "listen_addresses='*'" >> /etc/postgresql/14/main/postgresql.conf

USER root

# Configure Redis to allow external connections
RUN sed -i 's/^bind 127.0.0.1 ::1/bind 0.0.0.0/' /etc/redis/redis.conf && \
    sed -i 's/^protected-mode yes/protected-mode no/' /etc/redis/redis.conf

# Configure Supervisor to manage all services
RUN mkdir -p /var/log/supervisor
COPY <<EOF /etc/supervisor/conf.d/supervisord.conf
[supervisord]
nodaemon=true
logfile=/var/log/supervisor/supervisord.log
pidfile=/var/run/supervisord.pid

[program:nginx]
command=/usr/sbin/nginx -g "daemon off;"
autostart=true
autorestart=true
stdout_logfile=/var/log/supervisor/nginx_stdout.log
stderr_logfile=/var/log/supervisor/nginx_stderr.log

[program:api]
command=/usr/bin/node /app/api/server.js
autostart=true
autorestart=true
stdout_logfile=/var/log/supervisor/api_stdout.log
stderr_logfile=/var/log/supervisor/api_stderr.log

[program:postgresql]
command=/usr/lib/postgresql/14/bin/postgres -D /var/lib/postgresql/14/main -c config_file=/etc/postgresql/14/main/postgresql.conf
user=postgres
autostart=true
autorestart=true
stdout_logfile=/var/log/supervisor/postgres_stdout.log
stderr_logfile=/var/log/supervisor/postgres_stderr.log

[program:redis]
command=/usr/bin/redis-server /etc/redis/redis.conf
autostart=true
autorestart=true
stdout_logfile=/var/log/supervisor/redis_stdout.log
stderr_logfile=/var/log/supervisor/redis_stderr.log
EOF

# Expose all service ports
# Web Server (Nginx)
EXPOSE 80
# API Server (Node.js/Express)
EXPOSE 8080
# PostgreSQL Database
EXPOSE 5432
# Redis
EXPOSE 6379

# Health check to verify all services are running
HEALTHCHECK --interval=30s --timeout=10s --start-period=60s --retries=3 \
    CMD curl -f http://localhost:80/ && \
        curl -f http://localhost:8080/health && \
        pg_isready -h localhost -p 5432 -U postgres && \
        redis-cli -h localhost -p 6379 ping | grep -q PONG

WORKDIR /app

# Set environment variables for service connection
ENV DB_HOST=localhost \
    DB_PORT=5432 \
    DB_USER=postgres \
    DB_PASSWORD=devpassword \
    DB_NAME=devdb \
    REDIS_HOST=localhost \
    REDIS_PORT=6379 \
    API_PORT=8080 \
    WEB_PORT=80

CMD ["/usr/bin/supervisord", "-c", "/etc/supervisor/conf.d/supervisord.conf"]
